desc.en: Tyne and Wear Metro is an urban rail transit system in and around Newcastle, England. It is managed by Nexus and officially operated in 1980. It is regarded as the first modern light rail system in the United Kingdom. Its line covers Newcastle, Gateshead, Sunderland and other places, and extends to Newcastle International Airport. It has both light rail and subway characteristics, and the core area is operated by underground tunnels.
desc.zh: 泰恩-威尔地铁（Tyne and Wear Metro）是英国纽卡斯尔及周边地区的城市轨道交通系统，由Nexus公司管理，1980年正式运营，被视为英国首个现代轻轨系统。其线路覆盖纽卡斯尔、盖茨黑德、桑德兰等地，并延伸至纽卡斯尔国际机场，兼具轻轨与地铁特性，核心区域采用地下隧道运行。（内容摘自百度百科）
